creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248160
Patch for libmicrohttpd

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following users in Poudriere (13.2-RELEASE and 14.0-RELEASE, amd64):
audio/faust
audio/faustlive
audio/inscore
devel/libkiwix
mail/mfmod_openmetrics
misc/ola
multimedia/kodi
multimedia/librist
multimedia/motion
multimedia/musikcube
net/libnpupnp
net/opensips31
net-p2p/xmrig
security/gsad
security/iddawc
www/janus
www/ulfius
www/wget2
